schema_note: Matches heterogeneous-inference-runtime commit 02c8b9a field schema, which removed the undocumented fragmentation_ratio proxy. free_capacity_ratio and peak_allocation_utilization are honest complements of total_blocks vs peak_blocks_used (headroom and utilization at peak load), not fragmentation. The upstream kv_internal_fragmentation_ratio, contiguous_free_run_ratio, usefulness_score, usefulness_score_ema, adaptive_guard_active, and adaptive_prefetch_skips fields are pending upstream artifact regeneration and are intentionally omitted here rather than fabricated.
